stories.title: Shire Hall building set to disappear from Mold skyline next year
stories.summary: Flintshire’s iconic Shire Hall building will disappear from the Mold skyline next year if demolition plans go ahead. The work, planned for 2027/28 will cost Flintshire County Council £4.9 million and will clear the land for a potential future development. Since the council moved out of the building in February 2025 the disposal of the

stories.title: North Wales eye care team raises £440 for dementia charity
stories.summary: A North Wales domiciliary eye care team has raised £440 for Alzheimer’s Society after hosting a community bingo night in Holywell. The Specsavers Clwyd and Snowdonia Home Visits team welcomed almost 50 people to Halkyn Cricket Club for the fundraising event. Guests took part in a programme of bingo games and prize draws, with money

stories.title: Paramedic Science course “paused” at Wrexham University amid job shortages
stories.summary: Wrexham University’s Paramedic Science programme will not take on new students for the 2026-27 academic year, after Health Education and Improvement Wales (HEIW) paused commissioning of the course across Wales. The decision – taken in agreement with Welsh Government and the Welsh Ambulance Services University NHS Trust (WAST) – also affects the equivalent course at

stories.title: Shotton residents say waste dump is blocking emergency vehicle access to Health Street
stories.summary: Residents say an unlicensed waste dump is blocking emergency access to a narrow street in Shotton. An access road that leads to the rear of properties on Health Street in Shotton has been fenced off and rubble and waste dumped inside it. People living on the narrow residential street just off Rowleys Drive have challenged

stories.title: Saltney High Street salon burglary: man charged with seven offences
stories.summary: A 41-year-old Birkenhead man has been remanded in custody after being charged in connection with a burglary at a salon on Saltney High Street. David Christopher McCouid, of Sidney Street, Birkenhead, appeared before Mold Magistrates Court on 23 April.
